title: Synesthesia: Sound Visualizer
description: Addon to Extreme Sound Muffler that allows you to locate sound sources (or a standalone keybind)
body:
This is an addon to [Extreme Sound Muffler](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/extreme-sound-muffler) which lets you visualize sounds
![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_5487e66f-ac13-44c6-959e-a8659d878368.png) ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_56722444-589c-4043-98a6-04ad530c871d.png) ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_8f2a75fb-99be-44e0-9ca4-069298a3c7f9.png) ## Support Need help or have questions?
